2606.24040.title: Towards Version-aware Operations and Transaction Memories for Multi-layer MeMo
2606.24040.paper_summary: MeMo proposes language models with explicit multi-layer correlation matrix memories (CMMs), where memorization, retrieval, and forgetting are architectural operations. This paper asks how such memories can reduce the need for retraining when knowledge changes. For changes expressible as MeMo memory associations, the model's accessible knowledge can be updated by editing explicit memories rather than retraining the whole model. We propose a version-aware operation layer in which high-level operations such as replace, obsolete, keep-history, rollback, and trace are compiled into MeMo-native primitive calls over sequences and tokens. The key observation is that a version-aware operation is rarely a single MeMo association. It is an ordered transaction of primitive edits, for example forgetting one sequence-token chain, memorizing another, preserving a historical chain, and recording an inverse program. The framework introduces two auxiliary CMMs: a Version CMM (V-CMM) for mapping version transitions to transaction handles, and a Transaction CMM (T-CMM) for storing reusable change contents and inverse programs. It supports both direct sequence-level edits and structured diff-level inputs, and outlines an evaluation route for update success, rollback, traceability, locality, and transaction reuse.
2606.24040.paper_summary_zh: MeMo 提出了具有明確多層關聯矩陣記憶體 (CMMs) 的語言模型，其中記憶、檢索和遺忘是架構操作。這篇論文探討了這樣的記憶如何在知識變更時減少重新訓練的需求。對於可以表達為 MeMo 記憶關聯的變更，模型的可訪問知識可以通過編輯明確的記憶來更新，而不是重新訓練整個模型。我們提出了一個版本感知操作層，其中高級操作如替換、過時、保留歷史、回滾和追蹤被編譯成 MeMo 原生的原始調用，作用於序列和標記。關鍵觀察是，版本感知操作很少是一個單一的 MeMo 關聯。它是一個有序的原始編輯交易，例如忘記一個序列-標記鏈，記住另一個，保留一個歷史鏈，並記錄一個逆程序。該框架引入了兩個輔助 CMMs：一個版本 CMM (V-CMM) 用於將版本轉換映射到交易句柄，和一個交易 CMM (T-CMM) 用於存儲可重用的變更內容和逆程序。它支持直接的序列級編輯和結構化的差異級輸入，並概述了更新成功、回滾、可追溯性、局部性和交易重用的評估路徑。
2606.24040.author: Peiran Li et.al.
